name: Vystar Corp
business: Vystar Corporation owns and manufactures eco-friendly products under brands Vytex (ultra-low protein natural rubber latex raw material), RxAir (air purification systems), and Fluid Energy Conversion (energy and water treatment technology). Vytex is supplied to manufacturers for use in medical, consumer, and industrial products, while RxAir products target the indoor air quality market for home and medical use.

exposures.sentence: Vytex NRL, our ultra-low protein natural rubber latex has been introduced throughout the worldwide marketplace that uses NRL or latex substitutes as a raw material for end products.
Vystar has expanded Vytex into the consumer arena with an introduction into the bedding category, aligning with key foam manufacturers to create mattresses, mattress toppers and pillows.
All of our products are FDA certified as Class II medical devices and kill germs viruses and bacteria.
The RxAir uses high-intensity germicidal UV lamps that destroy bacteria and viruses instead of just trapping them, setting it apart from ordinary air filtration units.

FEC has taken a position as a global green energy company with a multitude of new technologies including an array of patented, and soon-to-be patented, technology destined to change energy production and energy usage in many arenas.
This ultrasonic technology is applied into water products with the same goal.

Vystar and the Indian Rubber Manufacturers Research Association’s (IRMRA) had been actively collaborating to develop viscoelastic deproteinized natural rubber (DPNR) variants having properties for expanding applications in specific new arenas such as green tires, biodegradable and other unique bioelastoplast product lines that desire a new approach.

catalysts.sentence: In July 2025, the Company unveiled a newly redesigned website, www.vytex.com, as part of a comprehensive brand refresh aimed at improving customer interaction and enhancing digital presence.

catalysts.event: FEC/Hughes trial for hard water abatement and dialysis efficiency
catalysts.sentence: By the end of the year, we expect to run a trial on FEC/Hughes devices for hard water abatement and dialysis membrane efficiency.

catalysts.event: Completion of RxAir prototype testing with FEC technology
catalysts.sentence: We expect testing to be completed by the end of 2026.
